sprintGoal: 评审 Incremental Knowledge Search 设计文档，确保其满足 Searchkiller 系统架构标准和 Evaluator 集成兼容性

dimensions.name: architecture_soundness
dimensions.description: 架构健全性：数据流完整、模块划分清晰、权限层级正确、接口一致

dimensions.name: probe_alignment
dimensions.description: Probe对齐度：设计是否覆盖 D1-D5 五个评估维度的关注点（API可靠性/搜索质量/数据完整性/缓存有效性/优雅降级）

dimensions.name: edge_case_coverage
dimensions.description: 边界覆盖度：Edge cases、安全性、超时处理、并发竞态、限流保护、可观测性

dimensions.name: evaluator_compatibility
dimensions.description: Evaluator集成兼容性：BackendJudge/LLMJudge/BackendEvaluator probe 是否无破坏性影响

dimensions.name: implementation_readiness
dimensions.description: 实现就绪度：类型定义完整、接口签名明确、迁移方案可行、无歧义

negotiationHistory.changes: Proposed design review contract with 5 dimensions: architecture_soundness(20%), probe_alignment(25%), edge_case_coverage(25%), evaluator_compatibility(15%), implementation_readiness(15%)
Accepted contract for design document multi-round evaluation

roundResults.evaluatorFeedback: R1: 架构优秀但 Evaluator 集成缝隙明显。2个P0 (timeout + rate limit)、4个P1 (dedup + mapping + race + origin)、4个P2 待修复。加权分 6.89 < minWeightedScore 7.0。
R2: 所有10个findings已修复。v0.2.0设计文档质量显著提升。加权分8.60 >= autoApproveScore 8.5 → AUTO-APPROVED。残余3个P3级别问题不阻塞。
